C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\html\landing.html:12:  <h1 id="landing-title" class="landing-title">GUESS THE FOOTBALL<br>NATIONAL TEAM NAME<br>BY PLAYERS' CLUB</h1>
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Career Path - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\html\landing.html:12:  <h1 id="landing-title" class="landing-title">GUESS THE FOOTBALL<br>NATIONAL TEAM NAME<br>BY PLAYERS' CLUB</h1>
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Regular\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Shorts\html\landing.html:12:  <h1 id="landing-title" class="landing-title">GUESS THE FOOTBALL<br>NATIONAL TEAM NAME<br>BY PLAYERS' CLUB</h1>
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Main Runner - Lineups - Shorts\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).

C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Squad Formation\README.md:7:- `Squad Formation/Teams/<Country>/<League>/<Official club name>.json` — club squads. The **filename** is the Transfermarkt club name (e.g. `Birmingham City.json`, `Arsenal FC.json`), not the logo filename (e.g. `birmingham.football-logos.cc.png`). The `imagePath` field inside the JSON still points at the real logo file.
C:\Users\Rom\Documents\GitHub\Football Channel\Squad Formation\README.md:12:The top-level **`name`** field is always the **official Transfermarkt club or national-team name** from the API (e.g. `Amiens SC`), not text derived from logo filenames (e.g. `amiens.football-logos.cc`). Player **nationality** strings use the same official country/region names as on Transfermarkt, via `_transfermarkt_nationality_id_map.json` (rebuild with `--refresh-nat-map` after changing flags).
